channel.title: AI on Thomson MO5 Development: First Steps
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Thomson MO5 Development: First Steps

item.title: Day 2: Vibe Coding with ChatGPT
item.description: A look back at my first day of vibe coding: experimenting with ChatGPT to code a small retro game.

item.title: Day 3: Vibe Coding with Copilot
item.description: Second day of vibe coding: this time with Copilot, starting from Olivier P’s repository to generate an MO5 disk image and attempt a first keyboard input.

item.title: Day 4: Vibe Coding with Augment
item.description: Fourth day of vibe coding: this time with Augment, a surprisingly proactive coding agent that finally solved my MO5 I/O issue.

item.title: Day 5 – A DIY NAS to Host My RAG Server
item.description: Fifth day of vibe coding: how to locally host my MO5-dedicated RAG server.

item.title: Day 6 – RAG server, embeddings and vibe coding
item.description: Day six of vibe coding: Building and deploying my RAG server dedicated to MO5. Spoiler alert: vibe coding is expensive 😢
